ticket_text: I cannot log into my laptop after changing my password this morning. I have a customer call in 20 minutes and need access urgently.
Our VPN is down for the entire sales team and nobody can connect from home.
Please install Adobe Acrobat Pro on my workstation for contract review.
I clicked a suspicious email link and now my system is running slowly.
I need access to the finance shared drive for my new role starting today.
